calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-15-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carolyn Espy appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

The Court questions who the $427.00 attorney fee in connection with the sale of the real property was paid to. Ms. Espey stated that it was paid to the Attorney representing Celink (Lender), that it was paid directly from escrow and that they have refused to return it despite her efforts to get it back. The First Amended Petition for Final Distribution Under Will, etc. are under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-16-2020 Continued To Jan-11-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-14-2020 Continued To Nov-16-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-02-2020 Continued To Oct-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Espey, Esq., and Executor in pro per (appearing by video conference).

At the outset, the Court notes a number of outstanding matters that for now, preclude granting final distribution at this time. Ms. Espey responds, advising the Court that she has now been appointed Executor in the related estate proceeding in the United Kingdom and should be able access the bank accounts in the U.K. shortly.

The Court questions Ms. Espey as to the amount of cash retained in a single bank account and to its concern with respect to FDIC insurance. Ms. Espey reports that she was advised by the Bank's private banker that the single account was fully insured but upon further investigation discovered that this representation was erroneous. After further discussion, the Court will require separate accounts to insure full FDIC protection.

The Court continues the matter to October 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Court Examiner: Helen Yune Trowbridge; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. Bailiff: Deputy K. Kabasares. (D204)
